zh.lifeSummary: Isabel於1410年出生。她與Henry Lambart結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Isabel于1410年出生。她与Henry Lambart结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Isabel was born in 1410. She married Henry Lambart. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Isabel est née en 1410. Elle a épousé Henry Lambart. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Isabel wurde 1410 geboren. Sie hat Henry Lambart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Isabel è nata il nel 1410. Lei sposato Henry Lambart. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelは1410年に生まれた。Henry Lambartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel(은)는 1410년 태어났다. 그녀는 Henry Lambart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Isabel nasceu em 1410. Ela casou-se com Henry Lambart. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabel родилась в 1410 г. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Lambart. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Isabel nació en 1410. Se casó con Henry Lambart. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
